subcategory: interactive card carousel with stacking animation
use_cases: Showcasing image galleries in an interactive card carousel format
Displaying testimonials or reviews in a swipeable stack layout
Product feature highlights with smooth navigation animations
Portfolio or visual content browsing with light/dark mode support
Interactive onboarding flows with shuffle and reset capabilities
ai_summary: An interactive card stack component featuring smooth Framer Motion animations, navigation controls, and a shuffle/reset mechanism. Supports light and dark modes with swipeable card navigation using drag gestures and arrow keys. Ideal for showcasing visual content like photos, products, or features in an engaging carousel format with depth-based stacking effects.
